items.summary: Add a backend query function that aggregates repair tickets by their current stage/status and returns a count per stage (e.g., Awaiting Parts, Closed, Deployed, Diagnosing, Programming, QA Testing, Ready Deploy, Received, Repairing).

Add a backend query function that aggregates repair tickets by device model and returns the top failing models sorted by repair count descending (top 5 minimum: VX680, VX820, M400, Carbon 10, Carbon 8).
Add a TanStack Query hook in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts for fetching repairs-by-stage aggregation data from the new backend query function.
Add a TanStack Query hook in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts for fetching top-failing-models aggregation data from the new backend query function.

Add a 'Repairs by Stage' vertical bar chart to the existing DashboardPage (frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx) using Recharts BarChart. The bars must be green (#10b981 or similar), X-axis labels must show all nine stage names rotated at an angle for readability (matching the screenshot: AWAITING PARTS, CLOSED, DEPLOYED, DIAGNOSING, PROGRAMMING, QA TESTING, READY DEPLOY, RECEIVED, REPAIRING), and the Y-axis must show repair counts. The chart must be displayed in a card with the title 'Repairs by Stage' and pull live data via the useRepairsByStage hook.

Add a 'Top Failing Models' horizontal bar chart to the existing DashboardPage (frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx) using Recharts BarChart with layout='vertical'. The bars must be orange (#f59e0b or similar), Y-axis labels must show model names (VX680, VX820, M400, Carbon 10, Carbon 8), and the X-axis must show repair counts. The chart must be displayed in a card with the title 'Top Failing Models' and pull live data via the useTopFailingModels hook.

Lay out the two new charts side-by-side in a two-column grid row on the DashboardPage, matching the layout shown in the uploaded screenshot, positioned below the existing KPI cards and above the recent tickets/assets tables.
